THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH FACTS SHOWING FORESEABILITY AND KNOWLEDGE SUFFICIENT TO RAISE A DUTY FOR THIS DEFENDANT TO PROTECT PLAINTIFF FROM THIS INJURY. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL ARE DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT SECURITAS SECURITY SERVICES USA, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend if plaintiff can plead in good faith facts showing foreseability and knowledge sufficient to raise a duty for this defendant to protect plaintiff from this injury. Defendants' counsel are directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(C). Plaintiff's counsel is directed to read and comply with Local Rule 2.6(B). Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 = (301/PJB)
